accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text and the known content of the FWS rule.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; description of the rule's classifications is accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the resolution as disapproving the FWS lesser prairie-chicken listing rule under the CRA.

changes_to_existing_law.why: CRA disapproval does not amend existing statutes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers the single operative provision of disapproval.

correct_entities.why: Correctly identifies the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service and the full rule title.

correct_figures.why: Correctly cites 87 Fed. Reg. 72674 and November 25, 2022 publication date.
